ddls:
CREATE TABLE "npcs" (
  "npc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NPC */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the NPC */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the NPC (e.g., 29 - 30) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the NPC is found */,
  "reacts_to" TEXT /* Reactions of the NPC to player actions (e.g., None, AK) */,
  "npc_type" TEXT /* Type of NPC (e.g., merchant, warrior) */,
  "npc_faction" TEXT /* Faction the NPC belongs to (e.g., Alliance, Horde) */,
  "npc_behavior" TEXT /* Behavior of the NPC (e.g., friendly, hostile) */,
  "npc_dialogue" TEXT /* Dialogue the NPC can have with the player */,
  "npc_quests" TEXT /* Quests the NPC can offer */,
  "npc_items" TEXT /* Items the NPC can give or sell */,
  "npc_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the NPC's activities (e.g., patrol route, shop hours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("npc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_npcs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Stone Ridge, The Hedge) */,
  "terrain_type" TEXT /* Type of terrain (e.g., forest, desert) */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the location (e.g., temperate, tropical) */,
  "location_size" TEXT /* Size of the location (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  "poi_names" TEXT /* Points of interest within the location */,
  "poi_descriptions" TEXT /* Descriptions of the points of interest */,
  "npcs_present" TEXT /* List of NPCs that can be found in the location */,
  "weather_patterns" TEXT /* Common weather patterns in the location */,
  "day_night_cycle" TEXT /* Day and night cycle effects on the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quests" (
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quest */,
  "quest_name" TEXT /* Name of the quest */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Current stage of the quest */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the quest */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward for completing the quest */,
  "quest_type" TEXT /* Type of quest (e.g., gathering, combat) */,
  "quest_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the quest (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "quest_duration" TEXT /* Estimated time to complete the quest */,
  "quest_giver" TEXT /* NPC who gives the quest */,
  "quest_requirements" TEXT /* Prerequisites for starting the quest */,
  "quest_rewards" TEXT /* Detailed rewards for completing the quest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quests_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES quest_stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quest_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quest the stage belongs to */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the stage */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward for completing the stage */,
  "stage_type" TEXT /* Type of stage (e.g., gathering, combat) */,
  "stage_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the stage */,
  "stage_duration" TEXT /* Estimated time to complete the stage */,
  "stage_giver" TEXT /* NPC who gives the stage */,
  "stage_requirements" TEXT /* Prerequisites for starting the stage */,
  "stage_rewards" TEXT /* Detailed rewards for completing the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_progress" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quest the player is working on */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Current stage of the quest the player is on */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the player completed the stage */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_level" TEXT /* Level of the player */,
  "player_faction" TEXT /* Faction the player belongs to */,
  "quest_status" TEXT /* Current status of the quest (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "stage_status" TEXT /* Current status of the stage (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "quest_start_time" TEXT /* Time the player started the quest */,
  "quest_end_time" TEXT /* Time the player completed the quest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "quest_id", "stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the weather is occurring */,
  "weather_type" TEXT /* Type of weather (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  "weather_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the weather (e.g., 0.5, 1.0) */,
  "weather_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the weather event */,
  "weather_effects" TEXT /* Effects of the weather on NPCs and players */,
  "weather_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the weather event */,
  "weather_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the weather event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crafting_recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item being crafted */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource required for crafting */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource required */,
  "recipe_type" TEXT /* Type of recipe (e.g., weapon, armor) */,
  "recipe_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the recipe */,
  "recipe_time" TEXT /* Time required to craft the item */,
  "recipe_requirements" TEXT /* Prerequisites for crafting the item */,
  "recipe_location" TEXT /* Location where the recipe can be crafted */,
  "recipe_tool" TEXT /* Tool required for crafting the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id")
)
